nodes.itemHTML: • Code and Commentstars16 - The application to add the comments to a file in Github (demo).
• emelstars74 - A simple and functional machine learning library written in Elixir.
• Awful AIstars5.6k - A curated list to track current scary usages of AI - hoping to raise awareness.
• Insight Stash - Fast, Simple survey forms.
• zgen-compinit-tweakstars3 - Make compinit run only once after all loading is done by zgenstars1.3k.

• 256colorstars107 - Enhances the terminal environment with 256 colors. It looks at the chosen TERM environment variable and sees if there is respective ncurses' terminfo with 256 colors available. The result is a multicolor terminal, if available.
• autoenv-extendedstars135 - Extended version of the zsh-autoenvstars525 plugin.
• autoenvstars525 - If a directory contains a .env file, it will automatically be executed when you cd into it.
• autojumpstars12.6k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line. Install autojump-zsh for best results.
• autoupdate-antigenstars23 - Antigen doesn't do automatic updates like oh-my-zsh. This plugin adds auto updating for antigen, both of antigen and the bundles loaded in your configuration.
• aws-uploadstars0 - Boost your productivity with aws-upload.
• branch-managerstars11 - A plugin for managing git branches.
• cd-gitrootstars55 - A ZSH plugin to cd to the git repository root directory.
• cd-reminderstars9 - Display reminders when cd-ing into specified directories.
• colored-man-pagesstars31 - Colorize man pages.
• flow-pluginstars44 - This plugin makes the flow command available inside every subdirectory of the TYPO3 Flow distribution.
• fzf-marksstars351 - Little script to create, navigate and delete bookmarks in bash and zsh, using the fuzzy finder fzfstars36.6k.
• git-add-remotestars14 - Easily add the upstream remote to your git fork.
• git-aliases.zshstars57 - Creates a lot of useful aliases for combinations of commonly used git commands.
• git-extra-commandsstars644 - Extra git helper scripts packaged as a plugin.
• git-pluginstars3 - Adds some functions for git.
• git-prompt-useremailstars4 - Adds prompt reminders for git user.email.
• git-secretstars2.4k - A bash-tool to store your private data inside a git repository.
• git-syncstars41 - A ZSH plugin to sync git repositories and clean them up.
• grep2awkstars20 - ZLE widget to transform grep command into awk command.
• grunt-pluginstars7 - Add autocompletion for grunt.
• gvm (yerinle)stars1 - Provides autocompletion for gvm (Groovy enVironment Manager).
• history-syncstars143 - An Oh My Zsh plugin for GPG encrypted, Internet synchronized ZSH history using git.
• hub-ci-zsh-pluginstars0 - A simple plugin for adding hub ci-status to your ZSH theme.
• kill-nodestars6 - ZSH plugin for murdering node process families.
• lesaint-gitstars0 - Replacement git plugin for Oh-My-Zsh-compatible frameworks.
• nodestars6 - Srijan Shetty's nodejs plugin for ZSH with caching of nvm completions and autoloading of nvm if present.
• nvmstars1.5k - ZSH plugin for installing, updating and loading nvm.
• opera-git-pluginstars0 - git aliases.
• pyenv-lazy-loadstars3 - Plugin for lazy-loading pyenv in ZSH.
• pyenv-lazystars26 - Lazy load pyenv. The initial eval "$(pyenv init -)" is executed the first time pyenv is called.
• schrootstars0 - Show current chroot name in your prompt.
• sensei-gitstars3 - Adds many git aliases and helper shell functions.
• sudostars16 - The sudo plugin from oh-my-zsh, extracted to a standalone. Toggles sudo before the current/previous command by pressing ESC-ESC in emacs-mode or vi-command mode.
• tipzstars24 - Displays your alias if you have an alias for the command you just ran, similarly to alias-tipsstars485.
• tmux-zsh-vim-titlesstars20 - Create unified terminal titles for tmux, ZSH, and Vim/NVIM, modular.
• zconveystars51 - Adds ability to send commands to other ZSH sessions, you can use this to cd $PWD on all active Z shell sessions, for example.
• zedstars6 - A simple wrapper for zstars13.1k to install it via a ZSH plugin.
• appupstars9 - Adds start, stop, up and down commands when it detects a docker-compose.yml or Vagrantfile in the current directory (e.g. your application). Just run up and get coding!
• Fantasque-sansstars5.5k - Another Powerline-compatible font.
• cobalt2gitstars1 - Cobalt 2 theme with git extensions.
• hanpenstars0 - Shows git branch and status, last command exit code, last command execution time if more than ZSH_THEME_HANPEN_CMD_MAX_EXEC_TIME.
• kinda-fishystars5 - Based on Fishy theme, but shows full paths instead of abbreviated directories and only shows user@machine in ssh sessions and docker containers.
• multilinestars16 - Powerline-esque theme based on agnosterstars3.1k.
• nknustars0 - A simple oh-my-zsh theme.
• predawn-shellstars48 - Theme optimized for dark terminal themes.
• random-emoji-robbyrussellstars1 - Based on random-emoji and robbyrussell themes.
• aresponsesstars83 - Asyncio http mocking. Similar to the responsesstars3.2k library used for requestsstars45.2k
• aioresponsesstars285 - Helper for mock/fake web requests in Python aiohttp package.
• antibody-completionstars0 - This plugin provides completion for Antibodystars1.6k plugin manager.
• ctop - Tab completions for ctopstars11.5k.
• kafkastars31 - Completions for Apache kafka.
• kompose - Add tab completions for Kompose.
• kubeadm - Add tab completions for kubeadm.
• LMSstars357 - Access your self-hosted music using a web interface. (Demo) GPL-3.0 C++
• voxstars74 - A golang web framework for humans, inspired by Koa heavily.
• alex-robinhood-skillstars2 - Unoffical Alexa Skill for Robinhood.
• TriggerMesh - Serverless cloud with a library of event triggers to enable hybrid cloud and workload portability.
• Vert.x in Action by Julien Ponge
